findings.title: Missing Strict-Transport-Security Header
findings.description: The response is missing the Strict-Transport-Security security header.
findings.remediation:
1. Enforce Authentication: Ensure all API endpoints that access private data require a valid access token.
2. Validate Tokens: strict validation of JWT signatures and expiration.
3. Use Standard Libraries: Do not roll your own crypto.

findings.title: Missing X-Content-Type-Options Header

3. Use Standard Libraries: Do not roll your own crypto.
